## What does this PR do?

<!-- Describe the change clearly and concisely. Link any related issue: "Closes #123" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Performance / refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling
- [ ] New feature (additive, preserves existing behavior)
- [ ] Tone / UX / story change ← **discuss in an issue first**

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Ran the full dev stack (`npm run dev`) and exercised the emotion flow
- [ ] Tested on mobile (if the change touches layout, audio, or WebGL)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior changed
